english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
[Al Nasr – The Divine Support 110 : 0]

When Allah’s help comes with victory,
[Al Nasr – The Divine Support 110 : 1]

arabic text: وَرَأَيْتَ النَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
english translation text:
and you see the people entering Allah’s religion in throngs,
[Al Nasr – The Divine Support 110 : 2]

arabic text: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَاسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ تَوَّابًا
english translation text:
celebrate the praise of your Lord, and plead to Him for forgiveness. Indeed, He is all-clement.
[Al Nasr – The Divine Support 110 : 3]
